mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_DELIVERY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_delivery_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count, COALESCE(SUM(points_cost), 0) AS total_points_consumed FROM exchange_record WHERE deleted = 0
